name: Chiles Rellenos Casserole
recipeIngredient: 13/16 can Whole green chili peppers (7 oz.)
1 3/16 c Sharp Cheddar cheese (shredded, approx. 12 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the chili peppers lengthwise and remove seeds and pith.
2. Spread the chilies in a single layer in a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
3. Sprinkle Cheddar cheese, green onions, and 1-1/2 cups of mozzarella cheese over the chilies.
4. In a bowl, beat eggs, milk, flour, and salt together until smooth.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the chilies and cheese.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for 50 minutes or until a knife inserted into the custard comes out clean.
7. Meanwhile, mix the salsa with the remaining 1-1/2 cups of mozzarella cheese.
8. Sprinkle the mixture over the casserole and return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes or until the cheese melts.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
Per Serving: 33 grams protein, 22 grams carbohydrate, 271 milligrams cholesterol, 490 calories.
